---
title: ""
page-layout: article
---

# Gallery

::: {.quote}
*"Your network is your net worth."* -- Porter Gale.
:::

::: {.quote}
Workshops, summits, presentations, and moments beyond the desk.
:::

::: {.gallery-featured}
::: {.gallery-featured-item}
<img src="img/gallery/capstone.jpg" alt="Wellbeing+ Capstone Project 2026" onclick="openLightbox(this.src, this.alt)" />

::: {.gallery-featured-content}
### Wellbeing+ Capstone Project 2026

Served as Technical and Team Lead, building a privacy-compliant Kotlin Multiplatform health app for Nytia Labs. Delivered full authentication, HIPAA audit logging, wearable integration, and CI/CD pipeline.

**Category:** Capstone | **Year:** 2026
:::
:::
:::

::: {.gallery-grid}
::: {.gallery-card}
<div class="gallery-video-thumb" onclick="openVideo('img/gallery/graduation-video.mp4')">
  <img src="img/gallery/graduation-video-thumb.jpg" alt="Graduation Ceremony 2026" />
  <div class="gallery-play-btn">▶</div>
</div>

::: {.gallery-card-content}
**Milestone**
Graduation Ceremony, 2026
:::
:::

::: {.gallery-card}
<img src="img/gallery/graduation2026.jpg" alt="Graduation Ceremony 2026" onclick="openLightbox(this.src, this.alt)" />

::: {.gallery-card-content}
**MPS Informatics**
Graduation Ceremony, 2026
:::
:::

::: {.gallery-card}
<img src="img/gallery/graduation2023.jpg" alt="Graduation Moment 2023" onclick="openLightbox(this.src, this.alt)" />

::: {.gallery-card-content}
**MPhil Computer Science**
Graduation Ceremony, 2023
:::
:::

::: {.gallery-card}
<img src="img/gallery/cyberSSI.jpg" alt="Decoding Cybersecurity Event" onclick="openLightbox(this.src, this.alt)" />

::: {.gallery-card-content}
**Technical Support**
Decoding Cybersecurity Event, 2025
:::
:::

::: {.gallery-card}
<img src="img/gallery/projectManagementTeam.jpg" alt="Group photo with Ghana-Nigeria classmates" onclick="openLightbox(this.src, this.alt)" />

::: {.gallery-card-content}
**Teamwork**
Project Management Presentation, 2025
:::
:::

::: {.gallery-card}
<img src="img/gallery/workshopPLC.jpg" alt="Professional Learning Community (PLC) workshop at Adugyama SHS" onclick="openLightbox(this.src, this.alt)" />

::: {.gallery-card-content}
**Professional Development**
PLC Workshop, 2023
:::
:::
:::

<!-- Image lightbox -->
<div id="lightbox" class="lightbox" onclick="closeLightbox()">
  <span class="close-btn" onclick="closeLightbox()">&times;</span>
  <img class="lightbox-img" id="lightbox-img" src="" alt="">
  <div id="lightbox-caption" class="lightbox-caption"></div>
</div>

<!-- Video modal -->
<div id="vid-overlay" class="vid-overlay" onclick="closeVideo()" style="display:none; position:fixed; inset:0; background:rgba(0,0,0,0.95); z-index:9999; align-items:center; justify-content:center;">
  <span class="close-btn" onclick="closeVideo()" style="position:fixed; top:1.5rem; right:2rem; color:#fff; font-size:2.5rem; font-weight:bold; cursor:pointer; z-index:10000; line-height:1; background:none; border:none; transition:transform 0.3s ease;">&#10005;</span>
  <div onclick="event.stopPropagation()" style="display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; width:100%; height:100%;">
    <video id="vid-local" controls playsinline style="max-width:90vw; max-height:85vh; width:auto; height:auto; display:block; background:#000; border-radius:0.5rem; box-shadow:0 4px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.5);"></video>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {

  window.openLightbox = function(src, alt) {
    document.getElementById('lightbox-img').src = src;
    document.getElementById('lightbox-caption').textContent = alt || '';
    document.getElementById('lightbox').style.display = 'flex';
    document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden';
  };

  window.closeLightbox = function() {
    document.getElementById('lightbox').style.display = 'none';
    document.getElementById('lightbox-img').src = '';
    document.body.style.overflow = '';
  };

  window.openVideo = function(url) {
    var vid = document.getElementById('vid-local');
    var overlay = document.getElementById('vid-overlay');
    vid.src = url;
    vid.load();
    overlay.style.display = 'flex';
    document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden';
  };

  window.closeVideo = function() {
    var vid = document.getElementById('vid-local');
    var overlay = document.getElementById('vid-overlay');
    vid.pause();
    vid.src = '';
    overlay.style.display = 'none';
    document.body.style.overflow = '';
  };

  document.addEventListener('keydown', function(e) {
    if (e.key === 'Escape') {
      window.closeLightbox();
      window.closeVideo();
    }
  });

});
</script>
